Microsoft Teams:
The AI-Powered Platform for Work
Transform the way you communicate, collaborate, and engage at work, in the era of AI.
Download now

Products and services
Customer stories
Get started

Need help finding a product or solution? Try Ask Microsoft.
What is the value of M365 Copilot in Teams?
What are the key benefits of Teams?
FEATURED NEWS
Discover what’s happening with Teams
Pride is alive: new Teams backgrounds
This year, Pride isn’t just about showing up. It’s about choosing to live—openly, visibly, and fully. Show your support with new Pride backgrounds.
Download the backgrounds
From Threads to Workflows: Microsoft Teams Features That Boost Everyone’s Productivity
Organizations want to work faster and smarter. Guided by customer feedback, Microsoft Teams is adding new features like threads, multiple emoji reactions, and emoji-triggered workflows.
Learn more
Gartner® Magic Quadrant™
Microsoft was named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Unified Communications as a Service for the seventh year in a row, placing highest on the evaluation’s “ability to execute” axis and furthest on the “completeness of vision” axis.
7
Read the report
Prompt like a pro with Microsoft 365 Copilot in Teams
Realize the full potential of your team's decision-making with prompts for Copilot in Teams. Streamline and transform your meetings so that every idea is visualized, evaluated, and brought to life.
Learn more
SOLUTIONS
Simple, smart, secure
Chat & Channels
Meetings & Events
Phone
Rooms
Previous
Next
Streamline teamwork
Bring conversations, shared content, Microsoft Loop and OneNote pages, and third-party apps together in one place.
Customize views
Find, organize, and stay on top of chats and channels with personalized views that surface what matters most.
Collaborate securely
Protect chats and channels with access controls and information protection to help keep messages, files, and shared information secure.
Increase effectiveness
Use AI-powered workflows, Microsoft 365 Copilot and third-party agents to turn conversations into valuable, shared context and action.
Enable more effective meetings
Run more effective meetings with AI-driven insights, notes, and actions from Teams Facilitator agent.
1​
Break down language barriers
Enable real-time translation and interpretation so participants can engage in the language of their choice.
1​
Enhance protection
Safeguard every Teams meeting with built-in security controls and encryption to protect confidential content and conversations.
Strengthen engagement
Host and manage professional, branded Teams events at scale.
2​
Power advanced calling
Communicate effortlessly in your flow of work and enable connectivity with external phone numbers.
3
Engage customers
Improve customer experiences with collaborative call handling and reporting in Queues app.
4
Communicate intelligently
Use Copilot and agents to bring AI to every call, boosting productivity, saving time, and improving interactions.
Simplify management
Streamline call management and enjoy peace of mind with are liable and secure cloud-based calling solution.
Coordinate with ease
Streamline desk and meeting space booking with Places finder and Copilot
5
in Microsoft calendars.
Collaborate with impact
Enable inclusive, engaging meetings for in-room and remote participants.
Boost productivity with intelligent spaces
Utilize collaborative AI and agents like Facilitator
6
for help before, during, and after meetings.
Optimize workspaces
Simplify deployment, security, and management across your workspaces and gain insights for smart planning.
Back to tabs

Individuals
Enterprise
Education

Next

Grow your customer base with communications software designed for up to 300 employees.
Learn more

Connect with customers by video, chat, and phone using an affordable, all-in-one solution for up to 300 people.
Learn more

Choose between plans with and without Microsoft Teams and get desktop versions of Microsoft 365 apps and Clipchamp.
Learn more
Microsoft 365 Business Premium
Get everything in Microsoft 365 Business Standard plus advanced security and device management.
Learn more

Add cloud-based phone service to Teams to get all the features of a landline.
Learn more
Teams Rooms
Strengthen hybrid work with enhanced meeting experiences for every space.
Learn more

Get extra features that help make meetings more personalized, intelligent, and protected.
Learn more
Teams for individuals use
Plan events, share photos, and connect with your friends, family, and community.
Learn more
Teams (free)
Send messages, schedule calls for up to 60 minutes, and create communities for every interest.
Learn more
Microsoft 365 Family
Get Teams accounts for up to six people, plus Microsoft 365 apps and advanced security.
Learn more
Teams for enterprise
Empower your employees to get more done and transform the way they work.
Learn more
Teams Enterprise
Connect with customers by video, chat, and phone using an affordable, all-in-one solution for more than 300 people.
Learn more
Teams Premium
Grow your business with AI-powered capabilities and advanced protection for secure collaboration.
Learn more
Teams Phone
Communicate seamlessly with colleagues and customers with a reliable cloud calling service.
Learn more
Teams Rooms
Conduct meetings and facilitate inclusive collaboration and participation anywhere you work.
Learn more
Microsoft Places
Reimagine flexible work and transform spaces into engaging places using AI.
Learn more
Microsoft 365 Copilot
Boost productivity, ease collaboration, and transform the way you work with your own AI assistant.
Learn more
Teams for education
Make learning collaborative—for both students and educators.
Learn more
Office 365 Education
Students and educators at eligible institutions get Office 365 Education—including Teams—for free.
Learn more
Microsoft 365 Education
Choose from three different plans to suit your school’s needs.
Learn more

CUSTOMER STORIES
See how customers are innovating with Teams
previous

Next Slide
See all customer stories
Levi Strauss & Co. simplifies work and accelerates decision-making with Microsoft Foundry
Levi Strauss & Co. builds a unified Super Agent with Microsoft Azure AI Foundry to reduce complexity, accelerate work, and deliver better fan experiences.
Products
Microsoft Foundry
GitHub Copilot
Azure Functions
Read the story
Kimley-Horn brings Microsoft 365 Copilot to AEC work
Kimley-Horn uses Microsoft 365 Copilot to reduce AEC coordination friction and deliver trusted outcomes faster.
Products
Microsoft 365
Microsoft 365 Copilot
Microsoft Teams
Read the story
Premera Blue Cross makes AI mainstream with Copilot and Copilot Studio
With IT maxed out, Premera made AI mainstream with training, guardrails, and agents—cutting a 30–45 min workflow to ~3.
Products
Microsoft 365
Microsoft Copilot Studio
Azure
Read the story
Concentrix innovates with intelligent document processing at scale using Power Platform and AI Hub
Concentrix uses Power Platform and AI Hub to process 100,000 invoices monthly with up to 99% extraction accuracy.
Products
Microsoft Power Platform
SharePoint
Microsoft Teams
Read the story
Virtua Health innovates to improve patient care using Copilot as the UI to AI
Virtua Health is transforming patient outcomes and clinician efficiency based on Copilot and Power BI dashboards, enhanced by AI analytics in Azure.
Products
Microsoft Copilot
Microsoft Copilot Studio
Power BI
Read the story
Broward County Public Schools scales Microsoft 365 Copilot in record K-12 deployment
Broward County Public Schools transformed operations with the world's largest K-12 Microsoft 365 Copilot deployment across 20,000 users.
Products
Microsoft 365 Copilot
Microsoft Copilot Studio
Reading Progress
Read the story
Back to SUCCESS STORIES section
GET STARTED
Take the next step with AI enhanced Teams - built for your work, your passions, and the ideas you’re turning into reality.
For business
Grow your customer base with communications software designed for up to 300 employees.
See plans and pricing
For individuals
Grow your business, stay organized, and collaborate with clients. Plan events, share photos, and stay close to friends and family.
Try Teams for free
For enterprise
Achieve more with Teams accounts for more than 300 people.
Get started
For education
Make learning collaborative—for both students and educators.
Learn more
[1]
AI-powered meeting features are available with Microsoft 365 Personal, Family, Premium, and Teams Premium subscriptions. Feature availability may vary by plan.
[2]
Available as an add-on license, Attendee Capacity Packs extend Teams events to support up to 100,000 attendees.
[3]
Teams Phone enables advanced call handling and connectivity with a Public Switched Telephone Network (PSTN) solution. A PSTN solution is separate from a Teams Phone license. A PSTN solution provides a customer’s tenant with phone numbers and PSTN access to domestic, international, and emergency calling.
[4]
A Teams Premium license add-on to Teams Phone is required to access the Queues app.
[5]
Intelligent AI booking features require a M365 Copilot license.
[6]
AI-powered meeting features are included in a Teams Rooms Pro licensed room. No additional Copilot license is required.
[7]
Gartner, Magic Quadrant for Unified Communications as a Service, Pankil Sheth, Megan Fernandez, Christopher Trueman, Rafael Benitez, Nitin Narang 22 September 2025.​
The report was titled as Magic Quadrant for Unified Communications as a Service, Worldwide from 2015-2022.​
​
Gartner does not endorse any vendor, product or service depicted in its research publications and does not advise technology users to select only those vendors with the highest ratings or other designation. Gartner research publications consist of the opinions of Gartner’s Research & Advisory organization and should not be construed as statements of fact. Gartner disclaims all warranties, expressed or implied, with respect to this research, including any warranties of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose.​
​
Gartner is a registered trademark and service mark and Magic Quadrant is a registered trademark of Gartner, Inc. and/or its affiliates in the U.S. and internationally and are used herein with permission. All rights reserved.​

analysis.name: Microsoft Teams
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one chat, meetings, calling, and collaboration platform integrated with Microsoft 365 and Copilot AI.
analysis.ideal_customer: Microsoft 365 enterprise customers needing unified communications and collaboration, from SMB to large enterprise, plus education and frontline sectors

features.evidence_quote: personalized views that surface what matters most

differentiators: Deep native integration with Microsoft 365 suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, SharePoint)
Microsoft 365 Copilot AI embedded across chat, meetings, and calls
Facilitator agent for AI-driven meeting notes/actions before/during/after meetings
Named a Leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for UCaaS for seventh consecutive year
Enterprise-grade security with GCC / GCC High / DoD government cloud deployments
Unified chat + meetings + phone + rooms in a single platform

recent_ships.what: Threads, multiple emoji reactions, and emoji-triggered workflows
recent_ships.source: From Threads to Workflows: Microsoft Teams Features That Boost Everyone's Productivity
Pride is alive: new Teams backgrounds

recent_ships.what: Teams Facilitator agent for AI-driven meeting notes and actions
recent_ships.source: AI-driven insights, notes, and actions from Teams Facilitator agent

recent_ships.what: Teams 2.0 client dropping Electron for Edge Webview2, halving memory usage
recent_ships.source: Microsoft Teams 2 will use half the memory, dropping Electron for Edge Webview2

praised: Comprehensive unified communications (chat + video + phone in one)
complaints: 'The Horror of Microsoft Teams' — persistent quality complaints on HN
'Why is Microsoft Teams still so bad?' — HN thread with 793 comments
Blocked Firefox Nightly, restricting browser choice
Zero-click, wormable, cross-platform RCE vulnerability disclosed
Heavy memory footprint (motivating the Edge Webview2 rewrite)
France pursuing sovereign replacement for Teams / Zoom / Meet

free_tier.limits: Free Teams with limited meeting length/participants; paid tiers required for business features

tiers.name: Microsoft Teams Essentials
tiers.headline_inclusions: Chat, call, video conferencing, meeting recordings, 10 GB storage/user, encryption

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Business Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: Web/mobile Office apps, custom email, 1 TB storage, up to 300 users, spam filtering

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Business Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: Desktop Office apps, webinars with registration, Loop workspaces, Clipchamp video editing

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Business Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Business Standard plus advanced security and device management

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot Business (add-on)
tiers.headline_inclusions: AI Copilot add-on layered on business plans

tiers.name: Teams Premium (add-on)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Advanced meeting AI, branding, protection, and analytics add-on

tiers.name: Enterprise (E1/E3/E5)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Enterprise-grade plans with advanced security, compliance, and analytics

pricing.notes: Annual subscription with auto-renew; 300-user cap on Business tier plans; Enterprise plans and government (GCC/GCC High/DoD) require contact sales; Copilot is a per-seat $21/mo add-on layered on top of business plans; product availability varies by market
